description: A photograph of a cardboard box filled with many small plastic-wrapped bundles, interspersed with bunches of fresh carrots with green tops. A printed placard behind shows a Customs and Border Protection field-operations seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Hidalgo, TX.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Hidalgo, TX
